violations.text: Raw shaved steak was observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as sliced deli meat in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The cutting board on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The kitchen hood vents have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Ceiling by back door in kitchen was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. Some ceiling areas in the kitchen 2. Caulking at the 3 bay sink Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
